panels.title: Hot
panels.description: Number of hot peers — fully promoted, providing chain data.

panels.title: Warm
panels.description: Number of warm peers — connected and idle, ready to promote.

panels.title: Cold
panels.description: Number of cold peers — known but not currently connected.

panels.title: Active
panels.description: Total active peer connections (hot + warm).

panels.title: Established
panels.description: Established TCP connections to peers.

panels.title: Known
panels.description: Total known peers in the peer selection set.

panels.title: Outgoing Conns
panels.description: Connections this node initiated to remote peers.

panels.title: Incoming Conns
panels.description: Connections remote peers initiated to this node.

panels.title: Full Duplex
panels.description: Peers with full-duplex (bidirectional) communication established.

panels.title: Duplex Conns
panels.description: Total number of duplex (bidirectional) connections.

panels.title: Unidirectional
panels.description: Peers with only unidirectional communication. Typically transient.

panels.title: Prunable
panels.description: Peers eligible for pruning by the peer selection governor.

panels.title: Peer States
panels.description: Peer count by state (hot/warm/cold) over time.

panels.title: Connections
panels.description: Connection counts (incoming/outgoing) over time.

panels.title: Peer Promotions & Demotions
panels.description: Rate of peers being promoted or demoted between connection states.

panels.title: Peer Churn
panels.description: Rate of peers connecting and disconnecting. High churn may indicate network instability.

panels.title: Peers by Source (hot & warm)
panels.description: Hot and warm peer counts broken down by source (local config, peer sharing, DNS).

panels.title: Events Rate
panels.description: Rate of peer-related events (connect, disconnect, promote, demote).

panels.title: Peer Gov Events
panels.description: Peer governance events from the Cardano peer selection governor.

panels.title: chainsync event distribution
panels.description: Distribution of chain sync events received from peers.

panels.title: peer events
panels.description: Per-peer event rate. Identifies noisy or failing peers.
